title: Protected pages require sign-in
description: A visitor who is not authenticated cannot access protected student, teacher, or admin pages and is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify protected content is not visible

title: Student reviews a saved submission and grade on a task
description: A student who already submitted a task can open the task page and see the saved answer together with the graded result instead of a submission editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click a course the student can access
Open a task they previously submitted
Verify the saved answer is visible
Verify the graded score or feedback is visible

title: Log in as a student and reach the dashboard
description: An existing student can sign in with valid credentials and land on their dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Student reviews a graded task submission
description: A student can open a task they already submitted and see the saved answer along with the grade and feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the enrolled course from the dashboard
Open a task from the course detail page
Verify the saved submission is displayed
Verify the grade and feedback are displayed

title: Student requests enrollment from course detail
description: A logged-in student can request enrollment from a course detail page and see the request status update.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click a published course card
Request enrollment for the course
Verify an enrollment status update is visible
Verify the course remains accessible on the detail page

title: Register a student account and reach the dashboard
description: A new student can create an account and is taken to the dashboard immediately after registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the name field with New Student
Fill in the email field with new.student@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Select the student role from the role selector
Submit the registration form
Verify the dashboard is displayed

title: Student opens dashboard course and reaches course detail
description: A logged-in student can view their dashboard courses and open a course detail page from a course card.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the course card for an enrolled course
Verify the course detail page is displayed
Verify course information is visible

title: Student opens a task from course detail
description: An accepted student can open a task from the course detail page and view the task page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click a course the student can access
Open a task from the course detail page
Verify the task page is displayed
Verify task details are visible

title: Teacher grades a student submission
description: A logged-in teacher can open a task, review submissions, and save grading feedback for a student.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open a task that has student submissions
Enter a score and optional feedback for a submission
Save the grade
Verify the updated grade is visible
Verify the feedback is visible

title: Teacher opens dashboard owned course and reaches course detail
description: A logged-in teacher can view owned courses on the dashboard and open a course detail page from a course card.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the course card for an owned course
Verify the course detail page is displayed
Verify course information is visible

title: Student opens a lesson from course detail
description: An accepted student can open a lesson from the course detail page and view the lesson content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click a course the student can access
Open a lesson from the course detail page
Verify the lesson page is displayed
Verify lesson content is visible

title: Student opens an accepted lesson from a course
description: A student can open a course, access an available lesson, and see the lesson content displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the enrolled course from the dashboard
Open a lesson from the course detail page
Verify the lesson content is displayed
Verify the course detail page can be returned to

title: Approve a pending teacher account
description: This verifies that a super admin can approve a pending teacher and the teacher is removed from the review queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin review link
Click the approval control for a pending teacher account
Verify the pending teacher is removed from the review list

title: Visitor opens a course from the catalog
description: A visitor can open a published course from the catalog and reach the course detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /courses
Click a published course card
Verify the course detail page is displayed
Verify course information is visible

title: Reject a pending teacher account
description: This verifies that a super admin can reject a pending teacher and the teacher is removed from the review queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin review link
Click the rejection control for a pending teacher account
Verify the pending teacher is removed from the review list

title: Student views course grades summary
description: A student can open the grade summary for a course and see task statuses, scores, and feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the enrolled course from the dashboard
Open the grade summary for the course
Verify all course tasks are listed
Verify task status and grading details are displayed

title: Super admin approves a teacher account
description: A super admin can approve a pending teacher account and see it removed from the pending queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the admin panel
Approve a pending teacher account
Verify the approved account is no longer in the pending queue
Verify the approval result is visible

title: Public visitor browses courses and opens a course detail
description: A visitor can search the public catalog, open a course card, and reach the course detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /courses
Search for a published course
Open a course card
Verify the course detail page is displayed
Verify lessons and tasks are visible

title: Student explores courses from dashboard
description: A logged-in student can use the dashboard to open the public course catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the option to explore courses
Verify the course catalog is displayed
Verify published courses are visible

title: Super admin reviews the teacher approval queue
description: A super admin can open the admin page and see pending teacher accounts waiting for approval.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the admin panel
Verify the pending teacher queue is displayed
Verify pending teacher accounts are visible

title: Teacher sees owned courses on the dashboard
description: A teacher can log in and view the courses they own on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify owned courses are displayed on the dashboard
Verify course navigation is available

title: Review pending teacher accounts on admin page
description: This verifies that a super admin can open the admin area and see pending teacher accounts awaiting review.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin review link
Verify pending teacher accounts are displayed

title: Visitor searches the course catalog
description: A visitor can search the public catalog and see the list filtered to matching courses.

steps.description: Navigate to /courses
Fill in the search field with a course keyword
Verify matching course cards are displayed
Verify unrelated course cards are not displayed

title: Admin reviews pending teacher accounts
description: A super admin can open the admin panel and see pending teacher approvals ready for review.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin panel
Verify the pending teacher approval queue is displayed
Verify review actions are available for pending teachers

title: Admin approves a pending teacher account
description: A super admin can approve a pending teacher and see the account removed from the review queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin panel
Approve a pending teacher account
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the approved account is removed from the pending queue

title: Register a teacher account and see pending approval
description: A new teacher can create an account and is shown that approval is pending before teaching access is granted.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the name field with New Teacher
Fill in the email field with new.teacher@example.com
Fill in the password field with ValidPass123!
Select the teacher role from the role selector
Submit the registration form
Verify a pending approval message is visible

title: Admin rejects a pending teacher account
description: A super admin can reject a pending teacher and see the account removed from the review queue.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the admin panel
Reject a pending teacher account
Verify a rejection confirmation is visible
Verify the rejected account is removed from the pending queue

title: Teacher sees pending approval after registration
description: A new teacher can register successfully and see a pending approval state instead of immediate teaching access.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the name field with a new teacher name
Fill in the email field with a new teacher email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Select the teacher role
Submit the registration form
Verify a pending approval state is visible
Verify teaching access is not yet available

title: Prevent non-admin access to the admin page
description: This verifies that a non-admin user cannot view the super admin review area and is blocked from accessing it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin review link
Verify access to the admin area is blocked

title: Show an empty admin queue when no teachers are pending
description: This verifies that the admin page shows an empty state when there are no pending teacher accounts to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the admin review link
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Show an invalid login error for incorrect credentials
description: A visitor who submits wrong credentials sees a clear login failure message and stays on the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the login form is still displayed

title: Course catalog shows no matches for an unmatched search
description: A visitor can search the course catalog with a query that matches nothing and see an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /courses
Fill in the search field with a unique unmatched keyword
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no course cards are displayed

title: Open the login page from the landing page
description: A visitor can start from the homepage and reach the login screen to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to go to the login page
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Open the registration page from the landing page
description: A visitor can start from the homepage and reach the registration screen to create an account.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to go to the registration page
Verify the registration form is displayed
